Title: Strip existing floor and wall tiles, old skirting, and architrave
Body: Remove customer's existing tiles on floor and walls, including old skirting and architrave.

Title: Prep and PVA ceiling and walls
Body: Prep and PVA ceiling and all walls. Bond out all chases made by electrician and any disturbance from tiles. Supply and fit new skim beads. Skim ceiling and walls.

Title: Self-level floor ready for electric matting
Body: Once floor tiles are up, self-level floor ready to install electric matting.

Title: Fit customer-supplied kitchen floor tiles and grout
Body: Fit customer's supplied tiles to kitchen floor, supplying all adhesive and spacers. Grout once dried, supplying all grout required.
Notes: Price based on 600x600 tiles. Smaller tiles may incur additional cost.

Title: Drill 4-inch core hole and fit external vent grill
Body: Drill 4-inch core hole through brickwork, supplying black or white external vent grill.

Title: Disconnect and reconnect new washing machine
Body: Disconnect and reconnect new washing machine to cold supply and run in all new wastes.
Notes: Minor rearrangement of cold supply and wastes may be required for integrated machine and could add cost.

Title: Disconnect and reconnect new dishwasher
Body: Disconnect and reconnect new dishwasher, supplying new isolation valve in sink unit.

Title: Fit customer's new integrated dryer and fit door
Body: Fit customer's new integrated dryer and fit door.
Notes: If freestanding, this price may be cheaper.

Title: Disconnect and reconnect gas hob with gas test certificate
Body: Gas Safe engineer to disconnect and reconnect gas hob. Includes any new pipework for new location and a gas test only certificate after works completed.

Title: Disconnect all appliances and make safe
Body: Disconnect all appliances and make safe.

Title: Install 4 new white LED ceiling spotlights
Body: Supply, wire and install 4 new white LED spot lights in ceiling.

Title: Install new condensation/humidity fan with isolation spur
Body: Supply, wire and install new condensation/humidity fan with isolation spur switch.

Title: Chase in two double sockets above worktop
Body: Chase in two double sockets as discussed above worktop.

Title: Install new fridge single socket
Body: Supply, wire and install new fridge single socket.

Title: Install new double socket for Quooker tap
Body: Supply, wire and install new double socket for Quooker tap.

Title: Install new socket for dryer
Body: Supply, wire and install new socket for dryer.

Title: Move oven spur into unit
Connect extractor hood, washing machine, dishwasher, and hob
Body: Connect new extractor hood, washing machine, dishwasher and hob. Includes all new works to suit new kitchen layout, all fitted with new socket fronts.

Title: Provide minor works electrical certificate
Body: Provide minor works electrical certificate for all works completed.

Title: Supply and fit 6mm insulation board.
Estimate_GBP: Option total covers all items below.

Title: Supply adhesive and primer for insulation board and floor prep.
Supply roughly 7sqm of ProWarm electric matting with all controls and thermostats required.

Status: Install Heatmiser thermostat and probe sensor
Title: Supply and fit white LED touch screen Heatmiser thermostat with heating probe sensor, 5–35 degree temperature range and fully programmable schedule.
Supply and fit separate isolation fused spur.
Installation of matting covered by a self-levelling compound to protect cables.
Supply and fit 1 roll of 10sqm Warmup DCM-PRO decoupling mat.
Estimate_GBP: Option total covers all items below.

Title: Supply and fit 7sqm of DCM-PRO loose heating cable.
Supply adhesive and primer.

Status: Install thermostat, controls, and heating probe sensor
Title: Supply and fit thermostat, all controls, and heating probe sensor.
Supply and fit separate isolation fused spur.
All rubbish to be left onsite for a waste collection man to collect.
Arrange 1 x 8 yard skip.
